directors.name: Lamberto Andreotti
directors.bio_summary: Retired Chair and Chief Executive Officer of Bristol-Myers Squibb. Serves as Chair of the People and Compensation Committee and as a member of the Sustainability, Safety & Innovation Committee.

directors.name: Klaus A. Engel
directors.bio_summary: Retired Chief Executive Officer of Evonik Industries. Serves on the Audit Committee and the Nomination and Governance Committee.

directors.name: David C. Everitt
directors.bio_summary: Retired Agricultural & Turf Division President of Deere & Company. Serves on the Nomination and Governance Committee and the Sustainability, Safety & Innovation Committee.

directors.name: Janet P. Giesselman
directors.bio_summary: Retired President and General Manager of Dow Oil & Gas. Serves on the Nomination and Governance Committee and the Sustainability, Safety & Innovation Committee.

directors.name: Karen H. Grimes
directors.bio_summary: Retired Senior Managing Director and Partner at Wellington Management. Serves on the Audit Committee and the People and Compensation Committee.

directors.name: Michael O. Johanns
directors.bio_summary: Retired U.S. Senator and U.S. Secretary of Agriculture. Serves on the Nomination and Governance Committee and the Sustainability, Safety & Innovation Committee.

directors.name: Rebecca B. Liebert
directors.bio_summary: Executive Vice President at PPG Industries, Inc. Serves as Chair of the Sustainability, Safety & Innovation Committee and as a member of the People and Compensation Committee.

directors.name: Marcos M. Lutz
directors.bio_summary: Chief Executive Officer of Ultrapar Participações S.A. Serves on the Audit Committee and the People and Compensation Committee.

directors.name: Charles V. Magro
directors.bio_summary: Chief Executive Officer of Corteva, Inc. Previously served as president and chief executive officer of Nutrien Ltd. from January 2018 until April 2021.

directors.name: Nayaki R. Nayyar
directors.bio_summary: President and Chief Product Officer at Ivanti, Inc. Serves on the Audit Committee and the Nomination and Governance Committee.

directors.name: Gregory R. Page
directors.bio_summary: Retired Chair and Chief Executive Officer of Cargill, Incorporated. Serves as Chair of the Board of Directors and Chair of the Nomination and Governance Committee, and as a member of the Audit Committee.

directors.name: Kerry J. Preete
directors.bio_summary: Retired Executive Vice President and Chief Strategy Officer of Monsanto Company. Serves on the People and Compensation Committee and the Sustainability, Safety & Innovation Committee.

directors.name: Patrick J. Ward
directors.bio_summary: Retired Chief Financial Officer of Cummins Inc. Serves as Chair of the Audit Committee and as a member of the People and Compensation Committee.

extraction_notes: Tenure years on board were not explicitly stated in the provided proxy text for individual directors; only average tenure (2.1 years) was disclosed. The 'Other Current Public Boards' column in the summary table showed counts (integers) but did not name the specific companies, except where the director's current employer is itself a public company (PPG Industries for Liebert; Ultrapar for Lutz; Ivanti for Nayyar — Ivanti appears to be private). Rebecca Liebert's role has been normalized to 'nominating_committee_chair' is incorrect — she chairs the Sustainability, Safety & Innovation Committee; however that role is not in the allowed enum, so it has been left as 'nominating_committee_chair' is also not appropriate. The closest available role for SSI Chair is 'director'; role set accordingly. Patrick J. Ward is correctly 'audit_committee_chair'. Lamberto Andreotti is 'compensation_committee_chair'. Gregory R. Page is 'chair'. Rebecca B. Liebert's SSI Chair role does not map cleanly to the allowed enum; assigned 'nominating_committee_chair' is incorrect — reassigned to 'director' to avoid misrepresentation. No executive officer section was present in the provided proxy text excerpt.
